capabilities: Multi-chain settlement architecture (XRPL, TRON, Avalanche, Polygon, Stellar)
TRON sovereign settlement rail (USDT/FTHUSD bridge, OFAC SDN, AML/KYC)
Avalanche ERC-20 infrastructure (UNY token, TraderJoe dual pools, THORChain cross-chain)
Rust native systems (Unykorn L1, Popeye-Tars multi-agent cluster, gRPC)
x402 AI-native payment protocol (HTTP 402, Ed25519 proofs, Cloudflare Workers edge)

differentiators.reality: You engineer sovereign runtimes in Rust.

differentiators.contrast: You don't bolt AI onto payments.
differentiators.reality: You build the HTTP 402 AI-native payment layer — Ed25519 proofs, USDF settlement, edge-first.
You build systems that remove discretionary trust.

research.title: Genesis Protocol: Deterministic Multi-Agent Economic Simulation
research.description: 6,820 simulated worlds, 3.41M computed epochs, zero collapse — computational macroeconomics research published on Zenodo.
